name: PromoContent
description: Promotional messaging content including ALA text and modal content.

ala.description: Plain text "as low as" monthly payment message, suitable for inline display on product and cart pages.

html_ala.description: HTML-formatted "as low as" monthly payment message with appropriate markup for web display.

headline.description: Modal headline text displayed at the top of the Affirm educational modal.

button.description: Call-to-action button label text for the modal.

html_footer.description: HTML-formatted legal disclosure footer for the modal.

description.description: Full description text for the educational modal explaining Affirm financing.
